timeline.label: Claim received
timeline.detail: EDI 837P received from Midtown Endocrine Associates clearinghouse.

timeline.label: Eligibility & coding validated
timeline.detail: Member active. CPT 99213 + ICD-10 E11.9 valid for visit type.

timeline.label: Adjudicated
timeline.detail: In-network office visit. Deductible already met. 20% coinsurance applied.

timeline.label: Provider paid
timeline.detail: EFT NW-EFT-9920331 sent to provider for $198.80.

timeline.label: Member notified
timeline.detail: EOB posted to member portal and email sent to member.aoyama@example.com.

failure_case.human_readable: Pended for coordination of benefits. Northwind needs the member's other insurance information before adjudication can complete.
failure_case.recommended_action: Page member-services to call the member and capture COB details. Pre-fill the script with the claim summary.
